jd.title: Flight Instructor

requirements.text: Bachelor's degree in Aviation or related field is a plus

Experience in Commercial Piloting and Flight SafetyExcellent communication and interpersonal skillsAbility to work in a team and maintain professionalismStrong attention to detail and problem-solving abilitiesFAA Flight Instructor certificationExperience as a flight instructor or airline pilot is highly desirableBachelor's degree in Aviation or related field is a plus

jd.full_description:
Role Description This is a part-time on-site role for a Flight Instructor at Splendid Aviation located in Corpus Christi, TX. The Flight Instructor will be responsible for conducting flight training, providing instruction in aviation theory and practical application, ensuring flight safety, and guiding students towards achieving their pilot licenses. The Flight Instructor will also participate in flight planning and debriefing sessions.
 Qualifications Instrument Rating, Aviation, and Piloting skillsExperience in Commercial Piloting and Flight SafetyExcellent communication and interpersonal skillsAbility to work in a team and maintain professionalismStrong attention to detail and problem-solving abilitiesFAA Flight Instructor certificationExperience as a flight instructor or airline pilot is highly desirableBachelor's degree in Aviation or related field is a plus
